commands.review_summary:
The PR removes the retired skill comments UI/API/tests/styles, converts legacy `llmEval` and comment-scam moderation actions into no-op tombstones, deletes an old eval script, and updates docs/specs for the retired surfaces.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This is a cleanup/removal PR, so I reviewed the candidate source, live PR state, related PR, and retained compatibility paths rather than reproducing a reported bug.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Manual review is needed because the PR is member-authored, currently conflicting, and changes moderation/security compatibility boundaries that automation should not choose.

target.title: Remove retired moderation surfaces
target.body:
## Summary
- Remove the retired skill comments UI, Convex API module, related tests, and CSS.
- Replace the old `llmEval` and comment scam moderation implementations with internal no-op tombstones for already-scheduled jobs.
- Remove the retired prompt-eval script and package script.
- Update docs/specs so they describe the current report, scan, cleanup, and stat behavior.

## Compatibility
- `comments` and `commentReports` stay in the schema so old production rows still validate.
- Ban and hard-delete cleanup still soft-delete or purge legacy comment rows.
- Historical `stats.comments` stays readable, but legacy `comment` / `uncomment` stat events now advance cursors without changing counters.
- Retired scheduled-job action names keep their legacy argument validators and return `{ ok: true, retired: true }`.
- The retained `commentModeration.ts` tombstone stays under CODEOWNERS and backend CodeQL coverage; deleted prompt-only files were removed from those gates.
- Current scan work continues through `securityScanJobs` and the external scan worker path.

## Flow
```mermaid
flowchart TD
  CommentUI[Skill comments UI/API] --> Removed[Deleted from app and Convex API]
  LegacyRows[Legacy comments/commentReports rows] --> Cleanup[Ban and hard-delete cleanup]
  LegacyJobs[Old scheduled llm/comment jobs] --> Tombstones[Retired internal action wrappers]
  Tombstones --> RetiredResult[Return ok retired]
  LegacyStats[Old comment/uncomment stat events] --> CursorOnly[Advance cursors without stat deltas]
  PublishScan[Current publish/rescan paths] --> ScanJobs[securityScanJobs]
  ScanJobs --> Worker[External scan worker]
```

## Proof
| Evidence | Claim Proved | How To Check |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `pr_net_diff.py --markdown` | Current PR head is `0a91d70d`; net diff is 37 files, 716 insertions, 6964 deletions, with no branch-only churn. | `python3 /Users/jmerhi/repos/AGENT.MDs/skills/pr-proof-pack/scripts/pr_net_diff.py --markdown` |
| Focused retired-surface tests | Tombstone wrappers accept legacy args, legacy validator shapes are retained, legacy comment cleanup still runs, and old comment stat events are cursor-only no-ops. | `bun run test convex/llmEval.test.ts convex/commentModeration.test.ts convex/skills.banBatches.test.ts convex/users.test.ts convex/skillStatEvents.test.ts convex/statsMaintenance.test.ts src/__tests__/skill-detail-page.test.tsx` |
| Native Codex review | Whole PR target, including the final compatibility-test commit, had no actionable findings across 3 consecutive native review passes. | `scripts/codex-review` on `origin/main...HEAD` |
| Cold review | Three fresh cold reviewers found no actionable findings on local `origin/main...HEAD`. | Decision log: `/Users/jmerhi/Documents/Obsidian/Work/10 Work/Atlassian/Autoreview/Decision Logs/clawhub/pr-2658-remove-retired-moderation-surfaces-20260616-101052.md` |
| Full unit coverage gate | The broader unit suite passes on this head. | `bun run ci:unit` |
| Types/build gate | App, Convex, package typechecks, and production build pass. | `bun run ci:types-build` |
| Static gate | Peer checks, audit ignores, formatting, lint, and dead-code checks pass. | `bun run ci:static` |
| Package gate | Schema, CLI package, and admin package verification pass. | `bun run ci:packages` |
| UI detector | The skill detail page source has no detector findings after removing the hidden comments panel. | `npx --yes impeccable detect src/components/SkillDetailPage.tsx --json` |

## Screenshots
No screenshots included. The removed comments panel was already behind a disabled feature flag; code/build/test proof is the useful evidence for this backend and dead-code cleanup.

## Verification
```text
bun run test convex/llmEval.test.ts convex/commentModeration.test.ts convex/skills.banBatches.test.ts convex/users.test.ts convex/skillStatEvents.test.ts convex/statsMaintenance.test.ts src/__tests__/skill-detail-page.test.tsx
PASS: 7 files, 150 tests

bun run ci:unit
PASS: 267 files passed, 1 skipped; 3284 tests passed, 1 skipped; coverage 86.59% statements / 75.74% branches / 87.02% functions / 90.07% lines

bun run ci:types-build
PASS

bun run ci:static
PASS

bun run ci:packages
PASS: packages/clawhub 25 files / 289 tests, artifact 1 file / 14 tests, packages/clawhub-admin 5 files / 61 tests

npx --yes impeccable detect src/components/SkillDetailPage.tsx --json
PASS: []

scripts/codex-review on origin/main...HEAD
PASS: 3 consecutive clean native review passes

cold review on origin/main...HEAD
PASS: 3 fresh reviewers, no actionable findings
```
